summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No GitHub mutations are planned: instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled; several PRs also carry maintainer signal, draft state, unresolved proof/review requirements, or failing/stale checks.

Focused bug-fix PR with missing required behavior proof and failing checks; keep blocked for maintainer/proof review.
Useful focused PR with proof supplied, but failed check state and provider allowlist correctness require maintainer review; no close/merge/fix action is allowed.
